text: Write a complete platformio.ini for an ESP32 project with [PERSON], MQTT, DHT22 sensor, OTA updates, and separate debug/release environments.
Write a PlatformIO ESP32 project with [PERSON] manager (captive portal for config), MQTT auto-reconnect, and deep sleep.
How to write unit tests for an Arduino/PlatformIO project that can run on both native and embedded targets?
Write PlatformIO code for an ESP32 BLE scanner that reports nearby devices via MQTT.
How to create a custom PlatformIO board definition for a custom ESP32-S3 PCB?
Write a PlatformIO ESP32 web server with REST API to control GPIOs and read ADC values.
How to set up PlatformIO CI/CD with GitHub Actions for automated testing and OTA deployment?
Write a PlatformIO library for a modular sensor abstraction with I2C auto-detection.
